candidate_grammar.boundary: All finite compositional structures generated from canonical objects, proof-carrying arrows, exact interface matching, empty-One returns, flattened paths, source-bound type predicates and held joint/alternative forms.
candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of objects, arrows, identity, composition, association, types, product/sum structure, functoriality, naturality and extra-composition status.

excluded_inputs: no ungenerated universe of all objects
no universal property without an exhaustive finite witness
intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of the complete 1024-candidate product, its sole all-preserving survivor, closure properties and controls.
statement: Canonical Fold forms act as objects and proof-carrying transitions as arrows. Identity is the empty-One return, composition is forced exactly by equal interfaces, and association follows from canonical complete path flattening. Types are source-bound predicates over generated carriers; products are complete joint pair support and sums retain held alternative labels. Functors preserve interfaces, identity and composition, while naturality is equality of the two complete composite traces.
title: Forced category, type and compositional structure
